questions.question:
Let \( \text{R (A,B,C,D,E,F)} \) be a relational schema with following functional dependencies:
\( \mathrm{C} \rightarrow \mathrm{F}, \mathrm{E} \rightarrow \mathrm{A}, \mathrm{EC} \rightarrow \mathrm{D}, \mathrm{A} \rightarrow \mathrm{B} \). Which of the following is a key for \( \mathrm{R} \) ?



Databases: UGC NET CSE | June 2023 | Part 2: 19
